ls -la
cd /home/user/projects
git status
docker compose up -d
find . -type f -name "*.log" -mtime +30
kubectl get pods -n staging
ssh user@server.example.com
tar -xzf archive.tar.gz -C /opt/
curl -s https://api.example.com/health
grep -rn "TODO" --include="*.go" .
npm install express
pip install flask
go test ./...
make build
awk '{print $1}' access.log | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20
rsync -avz --delete ./src/ user@host:/deploy/
git log --oneline --graph --all
docker system prune -af
chmod 755 /var/www/html
systemctl restart nginx
: 1711382400:0;git commit -m "initial commit"
: 1711382500:0;docker build -t myapp:latest .
: 1711382600:0;find . -type f -size +100M -exec ls -lh {} \;
: 1711382700:1;npm run build
: 1711382800:0;kubectl apply -f deployment.yaml
export PASSWORD=supersecret
curl -u admin:password123 https://api.example.com
aws configure set aws_secret_access_key AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
ls
cd
pwd
clear
history
